contexts.context: SF: I heard that <mark>modular</mark> development approaches are being incorporated. But is there…
…both. Do you think that the basic principle of <mark>modular</mark> development where everything can be overriden is necessary?…
SF: I would like to see the <mark>modular</mark> practices legitimized. I can always preprocess things.…
MK: Should the spec should be logically <mark>modular</mark>, and should it be editorially modular, are…
…be logically modular, and should it be editorially <mark>modular</mark>, are separable questions.
…, would be to make the specifications much more <mark>modular</mark>. They would be smaller and easier to read…
